description:
secretx-aws-kms/src/lib.rs:244, 250, 296, 301 use 'format!("{}", svc).into()' to box a single Display value as Box<dyn Error>. format! always allocates a new String via the format machinery; '.to_string()' invokes Display directly without the format-args plumbing.

Clippy will flag this as clippy::useless_format under pedantic lints. Either:
  (a) rewrite as 'svc.to_string().into()' (one-line change x4)
  (b) restructure to wrap svc as the concrete error source — but svc moves into the closure and its lifetime makes that awkward, so (a) is the practical fix.

What goes wrong: compiles to slightly more code (extra format machinery and arg slice), and a Rust reader will pause at the format! to ask 'what dynamic interpolation needs format_args here?' and find the answer is 'none'.
title: format!("{}", svc).into() should be svc.to_string().into() (or restructure)
